sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pasian minthang ta hen na lianpi bawi hi.
Leitung a itluat ma'n a Ta hongpia hi.
Mawhna pan suah tak nang a nunna pia hi,
Mi khempeuh a ding nunna kong hong hon hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Phat ve un, phat ve un, A thun leitungzelhen,
Phat ve un, phat un, Mikhempeuh lungdam hen,
Topa Jesu minsuang in Pa kiangzuan un,
Na lianpi bawizo hi aminthangsak un.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sisan tawh hong leizo tatkhiatna manzo,
A um mi tading Pasian kamciam omzo,
Mimawh pen nangawn in Zeisu a up leh,
A up phet in a mawh maipah ding hiveh.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Na lianpi honghilh a, na lianpi bawl hi.
Pasian ta hangin nopna cing ih ngah hi.
Hi hang lamdang Honpa Jesu ih muh tehno
Lungdamna, nuamna lianzaw kan ding hiveh.
